title: Cobbleworld
description: A Cobblemon survival modpack, partially inspired by RLCraft and Palworld
body:
# WIP
A Cobblemon survival modpack, partially inspired by RLCraft and Palworld.

### Notable features:
- More mobs, structures, and biomes, + revamped vanilla ones
- Various Cobblemon additions, including towns and legendary Pokemon structures
- More crops with Farmer's Delight
- More equipment, primarily through Mythic Metals
- Increased difficulty
- More bosses

### TO-DO:
- Possibly quests?
- Add more structures and mobs
- Small cosmetic and decoration mods
- Might downgrade to 1.20.1 for more mods

Feel free to suggest mod additions that fit the pack on the GitHub repo, especially ones that integrate well with Cobblemon.

### Credits:
[Fabulously Optimized as base](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)
